summary.en: A company creates and captures value by systematically collaborating with outside partners. Two structural sub-types per Chesbrough: outside-in opens R&D to external ideas inside the firm (P&G Connect & Develop), inside-out monetizes idle internal IP through external parties (GlaxoSmithKline patent pools).
summary.zh: 公司通过系统性地与外部伙伴协作来创造与捕获价值。Chesbrough 区分两个结构上不同的子类型:由外而内(把外部创意引入企业的研发流程,典型如宝洁 Connect & Develop);由内而外(把企业内部闲置的知识产权外溢给外部使用,典型如葛兰素史克的专利池)。

sources.label: Henry Chesbrough · 'The Era of Open Innovation' · MIT Sloan Management Review · Vol. 44 No. 3 · Spring 2003
Henry Chesbrough · Open Business Models: How to Thrive in the New Innovation Landscape · Harvard Business Review Press · 2006
Osterwalder & Pigneur · Business Model Generation · Wiley · 2010 (Pattern No. 5, pp. 108-119)

references.label: Henry Chesbrough · 'The Era of Open Innovation' · MIT Sloan Management Review

note.en: The originating article that named 'open innovation'. Contrasts the closed-innovation paradigm (smart people work for us; we win by doing the best internal R&D) with an open paradigm where external knowledge and unused internal IP both create value if their flows are designed for.
note.zh: 把「开放创新」这个名字立起来的原始文章。把封闭式创新范式(聪明人都在我们公司;靠最好的内部研发取胜)与开放式范式做对照,论证只要把流动设计好,外部知识与企业内部未使用的 IP 都能创造价值。

references.label: Henry Chesbrough · Open Business Models: How to Thrive in the New Innovation Landscape · Harvard Business Review Press

note.en: Book-length expansion that codified the outside-in vs inside-out distinction now used across the field. Argues the business model — not just the R&D process — has to be open, otherwise external ideas die in commercialization.
note.zh: 把后来在业界通用的「由外而内 / 由内而外」二分法系统化的书籍版本。论证开放的不能只是研发流程,商业模式本身也要开放,否则外部创意会卡在商业化阶段。

references.label: Osterwalder & Pigneur · Business Model Generation · Wiley

note.en: Adapts Open into the BMC pattern catalog (Pattern No. 5). Uses P&G Connect & Develop as the outside-in paradigm and GlaxoSmithKline patent pools as the inside-out paradigm; covers InnoCentive as the connector platform that runs the pattern as-a-service for many seekers.
note.zh: 把开放式商业模式收录为 BMC 模式手册(第 5 号模式)。以宝洁 Connect & Develop 作为「由外而内」范式、葛兰素史克专利池作为「由内而外」范式;并把 InnoCentive 作为承担连接器角色、把这一模式以服务形式提供给众多 Seeker 的平台来介绍。

name.zh: 由外而内(外部创意进入企业)

summary.en: The company opens its R&D / product process to systematically acquire external ideas, technology, or IP — through scouts, partnerships, crowdsourcing platforms, or licensing-in. Search cost falls; the firm trades 'NIH' (Not Invented Here) for productivity.
summary.zh: 公司把研发或产品流程对外开放,系统性地获取外部的创意、技术或知识产权 —— 通过技术猎手、合作伙伴、众包平台或许可引入。搜索成本下降,以放弃「不是我们发明的就不用」的心态换取研发产出率。

name.zh: 由内而外(内部闲置 IP 外溢)

summary.en: The company monetizes idle internal IP, R&D outputs, or technology by licensing, spin-out, joint-venture, or pool — capturing value from assets it would not commercialize itself. Cannibalization fear is the main barrier.
summary.zh: 公司把内部闲置的知识产权、研发产出或技术,通过授权、分拆、合资或专利池等方式商业化 —— 从那些自己不会商业化的资产里捕获价值。最大的障碍是对自我蚕食的担忧。
